notifications.title: Low Stock Alert: Cement (OPC 53 Grade)
notifications.message: Cement OPC 53 Grade at Site Warehouse A (Pune) has dropped to 120 bags, approaching the minimum threshold of 50 bags. Current consumption rate suggests 3-4 days of supply remaining. Please raise a purchase order immediately.

notifications.title: New Supply Receipt: Portland Cement PPC
notifications.message: Supply receipt SR-PO2026-0504 has been recorded. 250 bags of Portland Cement PPC received at Site Warehouse B (Mumbai Site) from UltraTech Cement Ltd. Inventory updated. GRN number: GRN-WH004-0510.

notifications.title: Warehouse Capacity Warning: Site Warehouse A
notifications.message: Site Warehouse A (Pune Site) is currently at 52.5% capacity (4,200 of 8,000 units). With upcoming deliveries of aggregates and bricks scheduled for next week, capacity may exceed 80%. Consider clearing dispatched stock or arranging additional storage.

notifications.title: Steel Delivery Confirmed: TMT Bars 12mm
notifications.message: Delivery of 1,000 kg TMT Steel Bars 12mm (Fe-500 grade) from TATA Steel Distributors has been confirmed and quality-checked. Material test certificates received. Stock updated in Site Warehouse A. PO#PO2026-0502 fulfilled.

notifications.title: Scheduled System Maintenance
notifications.message: The Stock Inventory ERP system will undergo scheduled maintenance on Saturday, 24 May 2026 from 11:00 PM to 2:00 AM IST. During this window the system will be unavailable. Please ensure all pending transactions are saved before 10:45 PM. Contact your system administrator for urgent access needs.
